contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Extended market_research/scripts/generate_advisory_snapshot.py with an auto-computed Growth goals table. Added               
    GROWTH_GOALS.json in agentic_ai_context (targets: $40K total QR sales + 100 USA Agroverse Partners by 2026-12-31). The script
    fetches live progress from the main ledger Monthly Statistics tab and the Agroverse Partners tab (filtered to USA via a         
    us_region predicate on the location column), and renders target/actual/%/days-left/pace in ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md so Grok advisors
     can reason about gap vs timeline rather than generic activity.
  
    Merged PRs:
                                                          
    - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/53 — generate_advisory_snapshot.py goal-progress extension                                          
    - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/commit/4450a6ebf83c7e55fc7fb735a79f34cd2a8af1dd — GROWTH_GOALS.json + operator stubs (constraints, weekly metrics)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
